ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO To Proceed With Administration Of The Estate
Off Calendar Jan-09-2008 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for Patricia Gray.

Mr. Vann reported that the petition had been filed and is on calendar for March 10, 2008. The matter was taken off calendar.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin, CSR# 11722. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: Deputy J. Capozzoli.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO To Proceed With Administration Of The Estate
Off Calendar Nov-06-2007 Reset To Jan-09-08 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Dennis Vann for the Personal Representative.

Mr. Vann reported that he was still in the process of collecting the dividends from the stocks. The Court informed Mr. Vann that the matter would be continued once more, at which time the Court would consider removing the Administrator. The matter was continued to January 09, 2008.

Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Helen Sorep-Matley CSR 225. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Bailiff: T. Bonner.

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO To Proceed With Administration Of The Estate
Off Calendar Oct-10-2007 Reset To Nov-06-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE FOR FAILURE TO To Proceed With Administration Of The Estate
Off Calendar Aug-22-2007 Reset To Oct-10-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Vann appearing for administrator. Counsel reported the administrator is now able to sell securities. Matter is continued to 10/10.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Lee.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of First & Final Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jul-11-2007 Set For Order To Show Cause On Aug-22-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204 For Order To Show Cause
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. The administrator has failed to proceed with administration of the estate. OSC will be issued to Dennis Vann and the administrator to appear on 8/22.
Judge Pro Tem: Dorothy L. McMath. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Del Rosario.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of First & Final Account And Petition For Final Distribution

MINI MINUTES: Dennis Vann appearing for administrator. Counsel is requesting for continuance. Matter is continued to 7/11.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Handa.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of First & Final Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Apr-11-2007 Continued To Jun-13-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Vann appearing for administrator. Counsel is requesting for continuance. They will need to sell the stocks and put the money in the husband's estate. Matter is continued to 6/13.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: R. Guitron.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of First & Final Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-07-2007 Continued To Apr-11-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Vann appearing for administrator. Counsel is looking into if 13100 declaration will be accepted to transfer property from husband's estate. Matter is continued to 4/11.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Fox.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of First & Final Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-31-2007 Continued To Mar-07-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Dennis Vann appearing for Mr. James. He has sent a letter to the client last week. The spouse is deceased. He should have file a Spousal Property Petition for this samll estate. He will contact the personal representative of his estate. Matter is continued to 3/7.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Of First & Final Account And Petition For Final Distribution
Off Calendar Jan-24-2007 Continued To Jan-31-07 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: No appearance made. This was Benjamin James' case. Dennis Vann may have taken over this case.
Matter is continued to 1/31. Clerk to call Dennis Vann.
Judge: John Dearman. Reporter: Katy Bersamin CSR#11722. Clerk: Ella Yip. Bailiff: Mizota.
